tax: Placed at family rank, Arc Fulgurants is defined by composition and formation mechanics, not by colour, size, or danger: a charged cloud body that strikes. A new genus belongs here only if it shows a striking charged-air body.
ap: The grouping is recognised by an arc-veined charged cloud. A field surveyor confirms membership from at least one persistent marker — arc-scorch and ozone — which survives even when the body disperses.
eco: Arc Fulgurants occupies charged storm-shafts. Persistence is elemental rather than reproductive: members form where air-pressure charges a storm-air pocket and recur with the shaft re-charges, sustaining themselves on atmospheric charge.
beh: Across the grouping, behaviour is the disturbance-response of the medium: strikes the best-grounded target. Roles, moods, and summoning circumstances are recorded on the entries below, not treated as new taxa.
traitsText: Shared characters: charged cloud and field-sense. These are grouping-level traits only; specific resistances, abilities, and field signs belong to each genus and species beneath this node.
abilities: Grouping-level abilities are the broad capacities implied by the shared body: lightning strikes and stunning discharge. Named, bounded powers are assigned to the species that actually possess them.
bg: In the Throat, Arc Fulgurants matters because lightning hazard near metal. It lets survey reports sort striking charge hazards from clinging ones without collapsing distinct hazards into one vague label.
g: Arc Fulgurants is the family-rank grouping of lightning-striking charged-air elementals within the True Elementals. Its members share a charged cloud body that strikes with branching lightning, and divide below into genus groups by charge build and strike range. The lightning hazard of charged shafts.
